demo.title: psychosynth.sh
demo.code:
# Free preflight — products, prices, payment surface
bankr prompt "Using the psychosynth skill, run discovery"

# Free deterministic preview — verify record shape before paying
bankr prompt "Using the psychosynth skill, preview the behavioral response library"

# Paid query — behavioral priors for a trading sim (USDC on Base via x402)
bankr prompt "Using the psychosynth skill, get 20 high-loss-aversion panic-prone profiles for my counterparty simulation"

# Paid query — profile-conditioned crisis responses
bankr prompt "Using the psychosynth skill, fetch trading-scenario responses with confidence at least 0.7"

setup: Install: `npx skills add psychosynth` or ask Bankr to install from the repo URL
Requires a Base mainnet wallet (chain ID `8453`) that can sign EIP-712 typed data — Bankr platform wallets sign the USDC EIP-3009 authorization automatically
No API key, no signup: discovery and previews are free; paid queries settle per-call in USDC over x402
